field.label: Duration of Cough (Days)
field.hint: Enter a number between 0 and 120 days.

field.label: High Fever Logged? (yes/no)
field.hint: Please type 'yes' or 'no' (accepts capitals or spaces).

field.label: Oxygen Saturation / SpO2 (%)
field.hint: Enter a percentage value between 40% and 100%.

field.label: Visible Chest Indrawing Observed? (yes/no)
field.hint: Look for subcostal retraction during inspiration. Enter yes/no.

field.label: Stethoscope Wheezing Detected? (yes/no)
field.hint: Auscultate lungs for high-pitched whistling. Enter yes/no.

workflow.outcome: CRITICAL RECOGNITION: High severe respiratory distress or failure probability detected. Administer immediate emergency triage protocols, provide supplemental oxygen, and organize rapid transit to the nearest hospital facility.

MANAGED CARE: Moderate respiratory duress verified by localized clinical follow-up tracking. Issue targeted respiratory antibiotic prescriptions per national community guidelines and schedule a mandatory check-in within 48 hours.

STABLE: Low risk categorization. Advise home rest, continuous fluid tracking, and supportive paracetamol for comfort. Instruct health workers or family to immediately re-engage if short breath patterns intensify.

ALERT: System parameters fell beneath confidence metrics or encountered network disruption. Transitioning client processing to manual nursing diagnostics protocols immediately. Do not release patient until reviewed.
